---
title: "tacfaSM"
output: html_document
---

# Data Model

$$
\begin{align}
y_{ij} \mid \mu_j, \phi_j, \boldsymbol{f}_i, \sigma_j^2 &\sim \mathcal{N}\left(\mu_j + \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}, \sigma_j^2 \right) \\
w_{im} \mid z_{im} &\sim \mathcal{Cat}\left(\boldsymbol{\psi}_{z_{im}}^*\right) \\
z_{im} &\sim \mathcal{Cat}\left(\boldsymbol{\theta}_i\right) \\
\boldsymbol{\theta}_i &= \frac{\exp\left\{\tau_k^* + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)} \right\}}{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp\left\{\tau_{k'}^* + \gamma_{k'}^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k')} \right\}}
\end{align}
$$

# Priors

$$
\begin{align}
\mu_j &\sim \mathcal{N}\left(\mu_0, \sigma_\mu^2\right) \\

\phi_j &\sim \mathcal{N}^+\left(\mu_\phi, \sigma_\phi^2\right) \\

\boldsymbol{f}_i \mid \rho &\overset{iid}{\sim} \mathcal{N}\left(\boldsymbol{0}, R\left(\rho\right)\right); \quad \boldsymbol{f}_i \in \mathbb{R}^L \\

\rho &\sim \text{Beta}\left(a_\rho, b_\rho\right) \\

\sigma_j^2 &\sim \text{InvGamma}\left(a_{\sigma^2}, b_{\sigma^2}\right) \\

\tilde{\boldsymbol{\psi}}_k &\sim \text{Dirichlet}(\boldsymbol{\beta}) \\

\tau_k &\sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_\tau, \sigma_\tau^2) \\

\gamma_k &\sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_\gamma, \sigma_\gamma^2)
\end{align}
$$

# Indices

$$
\begin{align}
i &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, N\right\} \\

j &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, J\right\} \\

l &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, L\right\} \\

k &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, K\right\} \\

m &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, M_i\right\} \\

v &\in \left\{1, 2, \dots, V\right\} \\

\end{align}
$$

# Functions

$$
\begin{align}
\phi_j^* &=
\begin{cases}
1 & \quad \text{if} \quad j \in \mathcal{A} \\
\phi_j & \quad \text{if} \quad j \notin \mathcal{A}
\end{cases} \\

\lambda_S(j) &= l \quad \text{if} \quad j \in \mathcal{S}_l \\

\psi_{vk}^* &=
\begin{cases}
\eta & \text{if } v = v_k \\
\epsilon & \text{if } v \in \mathcal{V},\; v \neq v_k \\
(1-\eta-(K-1)\epsilon)\,\tilde{\psi}_{vk} & \text{if } v \notin \mathcal{V}
\end{cases} \\

\epsilon &> 0; \eta \gg \epsilon \\

\tau_k^* &=
\begin{cases}
\tau_k & \quad \text{if} \quad k \neq K \\

0 & \quad \text{if} \quad k = K
\end{cases} \\

\gamma_k^* &=
\begin{cases}
c & \quad \text{if} \quad k \in \mathcal{B} \\
\gamma_k & \quad \text{if} \quad k \notin \mathcal{B} \ \wedge \ k \neq K \\
0 & \quad \text{if} \quad k = K
\end{cases} \\

\lambda_T(k) &= l \quad \text{if} \quad k \in \mathcal{T}_l \\

R_{l,l'} &=
\begin{cases}
1 & \quad \text{if} \quad l=l' \\
\rho & \quad \text{if} \quad l \neq l'
\end{cases} \\
\end{align}
$$

# Sets

$$
\begin{align}
\mathcal{A} &\subseteq \left\{1, 2, \dots, J\right\} \\

\bigcup_{l=1}^L \mathcal{S}_l &= \{1,\dots,J\}, 
\quad
\mathcal{S}_l \cap \mathcal{S}_{l'} = \varnothing \ \text{for } l \neq l' \\

\vert \mathcal{S}_l \vert &\geq 3 \ \forall \ l \\

\mathcal{V} &\subset \left\{1, 2, \dots, V\right\} = \left\{v_1, v_2, \dots, v_K\right\} \\

\vert \mathcal{V} \vert &= K; v_k \neq v_{k'} \ \text{for} \ k \neq k' \\

\mathcal{B} &\subseteq \left\{1, 2, \dots, K\right\} \\

\bigcup_{l=1}^L \mathcal{T}_l &= \{1,\dots,K\}, 
\quad
\mathcal{T}_l \cap \mathcal{T}_{l'} = \varnothing \ \text{for } l \neq l' \\
\end{align}
$$

# CFA Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align}
\ell(\{y_{ij}\}) 
&= \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{j=1}^J 
\left[
-\frac{1}{2}\log(2\pi \sigma_j^2)
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2}
\big(y_{ij} - \mu_j - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\big)^2
\right] \\
\\
&=
-\frac{NJ}{2}\log(2\pi)
-\frac{N}{2} \sum_{j=1}^J \log \sigma_j^2
-\frac{1}{2} \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{j=1}^J 
\frac{\big(y_{ij} - \mu_j - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\big)^2}{\sigma_j^2}
\end{align}
$$

# LDA Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align}
\ell(\{w_{im}, z_{im}\})
&=
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\left[
\log \theta_{i, z_{im}} + \log \psi^*_{w_{im}, z_{im}}
\right] \\
\\
&=
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\left[
\tau^*_{z_{im}} + \gamma^*_{z_{im}} f_{i,\lambda_T(z_{im})}
- \log \left( \sum_{k=1}^K \exp\{\tau_k^* + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}\} \right)
+ \log \psi^*_{w_{im}, z_{im}}
\right]
\end{align}
$$

# Priors

## Log-Prior for $\mu_j$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\mu_j)
\propto
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\mu^2}(\mu_j - \mu_0)^2
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\phi_j$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\phi_j)
\propto
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\phi^2}(\phi_j - \mu_\phi)^2,
\quad \phi_j > 0
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\boldsymbol{f}_i$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{f}_i \mid \rho)
&\propto
-\frac{1}{2}\log |R(\rho)|
-\frac{1}{2} \boldsymbol{f}_i^\top R(\rho)^{-1} \boldsymbol{f}_i
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\sigma_j^2$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\sigma_j^2)
\propto
-(a_{\sigma^2}+1)\log \sigma_j^2
- \frac{b_{\sigma^2}}{\sigma_j^2}
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\boldsymbol{\tau}$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{\tau})
\propto
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\tau^2}
\sum_{k=1}^{K-1} (\tau_k - \mu_\tau)^2
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\boldsymbol{\gamma}$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{\gamma})
\propto
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\gamma^2}
\sum_{k \notin \mathcal{B},\,k \neq K}
(\gamma_k - \mu_\gamma)^2
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\rho$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\rho)
\propto
(a_\rho - 1)\log \rho
+ (b_\rho - 1)\log (1 - \rho)
\end{align}
$$

## Log-Prior for $\boldsymbol{\psi}_k$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\tilde{\boldsymbol{\psi}}_k)
=
\log \Gamma\!\left(\sum_{v \notin \mathcal{V}} \beta_v\right)
- \sum_{v \notin \mathcal{V}} \log \Gamma(\beta_v)
+ \sum_{v \notin \mathcal{V}} (\beta_v - 1)\log \tilde{\psi}_{vk}
\end{align}
$$

# Full Conditionals

# Full Conditional for $\mu_j$

$$
\begin{align}
\mu_j \mid \cdot
&\sim \mathcal{N}\left(
\frac{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\right)
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}\mu_0
}{
\frac{N}{\sigma_j^2} + \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}
},
\;
\left(\frac{N}{\sigma_j^2} + \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}\right)^{-1}
\right)
\end{align}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\sigma_j^2$

$$
\begin{align}
\sigma_j^2 \mid \cdot
&\sim \text{InvGamma}\left(
a_{\sigma^2} + \frac{N}{2},
\;
b_{\sigma^2} + \frac{1}{2}\sum_{i=1}^N
\big(y_{ij} - \mu_j - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\big)^2
\right)
\end{align}
$$

# Full Conditional for $\phi_j$

$$
\begin{align}
\phi_j \mid \cdot
&\sim \mathcal{N}^+\left(
\frac{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}(y_{ij} - \mu_j)
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}\mu_\phi
}{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}^2
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}
},
\;
\left(
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}^2
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}
\right)^{-1}
\right)
\end{align}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{\psi}_k$

$$
\begin{align}
\tilde{\boldsymbol{\psi}}_{k,-\mathcal{V}} \mid \cdot
&\sim
\text{Dirichlet}\big(
\boldsymbol{\beta}_{-\mathcal{V}} + \boldsymbol{n}_{k,-\mathcal{V}}
\big) \\
n_{vk}
&=
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\mathbb{I}(z_{im}=k,\; w_{im}=v)
\end{align}
$$

## Log Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{f}_i$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{f}_i \mid \cdot)
&\propto
-\frac{1}{2} \boldsymbol{f}_i^\top R(\rho)^{-1} \boldsymbol{f}_i \\
&\quad
-\frac{1}{2} \sum_{j=1}^J
\frac{\big(y_{ij} - \mu_j - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\big)^2}{\sigma_j^2} \\
&\quad
+ \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\gamma^*_{z_{im}} f_{i,\lambda_T(z_{im})} \\
&\quad
- M_i \log \left( \sum_{k=1}^K 
\exp\{\tau_k^* + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}\} \right)
\end{align}
$$

## Log Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{\tau}$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{\tau} \mid \cdot)
&\propto
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\tau_{z_{im}} \, \mathbb{I}(z_{im} \neq K) \\
&\quad
- \sum_{i=1}^N M_i \,
\log \left(
\sum_{k=1}^{K-1}
\exp\{\tau_k + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}\}
+ \exp\{\gamma_K^* f_{i,\lambda_T(K)}\}
\right) \\
&\quad
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\tau^2}
\sum_{k=1}^{K-1} (\tau_k - \mu_\tau)^2
\end{align}
$$

## Log Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{\gamma}$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\boldsymbol{\gamma} \mid \cdot)
&\propto
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\gamma_{z_{im}} f_{i,\lambda_T(z_{im})}
\;\mathbb{I}\big(z_{im} \notin \mathcal{B},\; z_{im} \neq K\big) \\
&\quad
- \sum_{i=1}^N M_i \,
\log \Bigg(
1
+ \sum_{\substack{k=1 \\ k \notin \mathcal{B}}}^{K-1}
\exp\{\tau_k + \gamma_k f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}\}
+ \sum_{k \in \mathcal{B}} \exp\{\tau_k + c\, f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}\}
\Bigg) \\
&\quad
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\gamma^2}
\sum_{\substack{k=1 \\ k \notin \mathcal{B}}}^{K-1}
(\gamma_k - \mu_\gamma)^2
\end{align}
$$

## Log Full Conditional for $\rho$

$$
\begin{align}
\log p(\rho \mid \cdot)
&\propto
-\frac{N}{2}\log |R(\rho)| \\
&\quad
-\frac{1}{2} \sum_{i=1}^N
\boldsymbol{f}_i^\top R(\rho)^{-1} \boldsymbol{f}_i \\
&\quad
+ (a_\rho - 1)\log \rho
+ (b_\rho - 1)\log(1-\rho)
\end{align}
$$

## Full Conditional for $z_{im}$

$$
z_{im} \mid \cdot \;\sim\; \mathcal{Cat}\!\left( \boldsymbol{p}_{im} \right)
$$

$$
p_{im,k}
=
\frac{
\exp\!\left\{
\tau_k^* + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}
\right\}
\, \psi^*_{w_{im},k}
}{
\sum_{k'=1}^K
\exp\!\left\{
\tau_{k'}^* + \gamma_{k'}^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k')}
\right\}
\, \psi^*_{w_{im},k'}
}
$$

# Gibbs Sampler

## Step 0: Initialization

### 0.1 Fixed Quantities

Fix hyperparameters:

$$
\mu_0,\; \sigma_\mu^2,\;
\mu_\phi,\; \sigma_\phi^2,\;
a_{\sigma^2},\; b_{\sigma^2},\;
\mu_\tau,\; \sigma_\tau^2,\;
\mu_\gamma,\; \sigma_\gamma^2,\;
a_\rho,\; b_\rho,\;
\boldsymbol{\beta},\;
\eta,\; \epsilon,\; c
$$

Fix mappings and sets:

$$
\lambda_S(j), \quad \lambda_T(k), \quad
\mathcal{A},\; \mathcal{B},\; \mathcal{V},\;
\{\mathcal{S}_l\}_{l=1}^L,\;
\{\mathcal{T}_l\}_{l=1}^L
$$

---

### 0.2 Initialize Parameters

#### CFA parameters

For $j = 1,\dots,J$:

$$
\mu_j^{(0)} \sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_0, \sigma_\mu^2)
$$

$$
\sigma_j^{2(0)} \sim \text{InvGamma}(a_{\sigma^2}, b_{\sigma^2})
$$

$$
\phi_j^{(0)} =
\begin{cases}
1 & j \in \mathcal{A} \\
\text{draw from } \mathcal{N}^+(\mu_\phi, \sigma_\phi^2) & j \notin \mathcal{A}
\end{cases}
$$

---

#### Latent factors

For $i = 1,\dots,N$:

$$
\boldsymbol{f}_i^{(0)} \sim \mathcal{N}(\boldsymbol{0}, I_L)
$$

---

#### Topic parameters

For $k = 1,\dots,K$:

$$
\tau_k^{(0)} =
\begin{cases}
\mathcal{N}(\mu_\tau, \sigma_\tau^2) & k \neq K \\
0 & k = K
\end{cases}
$$

$$
\gamma_k^{(0)} =
\begin{cases}
c & k \in \mathcal{B} \\
\mathcal{N}(\mu_\gamma, \sigma_\gamma^2) & k \notin \mathcal{B},\; k \neq K \\
0 & k = K
\end{cases}
$$

---

#### Topic-word distributions

For each $k = 1,\dots,K$:

$$
\tilde{\boldsymbol{\psi}}_{k,-\mathcal{V}}
\sim
\text{Dirichlet}(\boldsymbol{\beta}_{-\mathcal{V}})
$$

Then define the full vector:

$$
\psi^*_{vk} =
\begin{cases}
\eta & v = v_k \\
\epsilon & v \in \mathcal{V},\; v \neq v_k \\
(1-\eta-(K-1)\epsilon)\,\tilde{\psi}_{vk} & v \notin \mathcal{V}
\end{cases}
$$

---

#### Correlation parameter

$$
\rho^{(0)} \sim \text{Beta}(a_\rho, b_\rho)
$$

---

### 0.3 Initialize Latent Assignments

For all $i = 1,\dots,N$, $m = 1,\dots,M_i$:

$$
z_{im}^{(0)} \sim \mathcal{Cat}\left(\frac{1}{K},\dots,\frac{1}{K}\right)
$$

---

### 0.4 Compute Sufficient Statistics

$$
n_{vk} = \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i}
\mathbb{I}(z_{im}=k,\; w_{im}=v)
$$

$$
n_{ik} = \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} \mathbb{I}(z_{im}=k)
$$

---

### 0.5 Precompute Covariance Structure

$$
R(\rho^{(0)}), \quad R(\rho^{(0)})^{-1}, \quad \log |R(\rho^{(0)})|
$$

---

### 0.6 Initialize Adaptive MH Proposals

#### Latent factors $\boldsymbol{f}_i$

For each $i$:

$$
\boldsymbol{f}_i' \sim \mathcal{N}\!\left(\boldsymbol{f}_i,\; \Sigma_f^{(i)}\right),
\quad
\Sigma_f^{(i)} = \delta_f I_L
$$

---

#### Topic intercepts $\boldsymbol{\tau}$

Let $\boldsymbol{\tau}_{1:K-1} \in \mathbb{R}^{K-1}$:

$$
\boldsymbol{\tau}' \sim \mathcal{N}(\boldsymbol{\tau}, \Sigma_\tau),
\quad
\Sigma_\tau = \delta_\tau I_{K-1}
$$

---

#### Topic loadings $\boldsymbol{\gamma}$

Let $\boldsymbol{\gamma}_{\{1,\dots,K-1\}\setminus \mathcal{B}} \in \mathbb{R}^{K-1-|\mathcal{B}|}$:

$$
\boldsymbol{\gamma}' \sim \mathcal{N}(\boldsymbol{\gamma}, \Sigma_\gamma),
\quad
\Sigma_\gamma = \delta_\gamma I
$$

---

#### Correlation parameter $\rho$

Work on transformed scale:

$$
\xi = \log\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho}\right)
$$

Proposal:

$$
\xi' \sim \mathcal{N}(\xi, \sigma_\rho^2)
$$

---

### 0.7 Storage and Tuning

Set:

$$
T \text{ (total iterations)}, \quad
B \text{ (burn-in)}, \quad
T_{\text{adapt}} \text{ (adaptation period)}
$$

Initialize storage for:

$$
\{\mu_j,\; \sigma_j^2,\; \phi_j\},\;
\{\boldsymbol{f}_i\},\;
\boldsymbol{\tau},\;
\boldsymbol{\gamma},\;
\rho
$$

---

### Summary

At the end of initialization, all parameters and latent variables have valid starting values, all constraints are enforced, and all Metropolis–Hastings proposal mechanisms are defined. The Markov chain is now ready to proceed to iteration $t = 1$.

## Step 1: Sample Topic Assignments $z_{im}$

For each $i = 1,\dots,N$ and $m = 1,\dots,M_i$:

$$
z_{im} \mid \cdot \sim \mathcal{Cat}(\boldsymbol{p}_{im})
$$

where

$$
p_{im,k}
=
\frac{
\exp\left\{
\tau_k^* + \gamma_k^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k)}
\right\}
\cdot
\psi^*_{w_{im},k}
}{
\sum_{k'=1}^K
\exp\left\{
\tau_{k'}^* + \gamma_{k'}^* f_{i,\lambda_T(k')}
\right\}
\cdot
\psi^*_{w_{im},k'}
}
$$

After sampling, update counts:

$$
n_{vk}, \quad n_{ik}
$$

## Step 2: Sample Topic-Word Distributions $\boldsymbol{\psi}_k$

For each $k = 1,\dots,K$:

$$
\left(
\frac{\psi_{vk}}{1-\eta-(K-1)\epsilon}
\right)_{v \notin \mathcal{V}}
\mid \cdot
\sim
\text{Dirichlet}(\boldsymbol{\beta}_{-\mathcal{V}} + \boldsymbol{n}_{k,-\mathcal{V}})
$$

Then construct:

$$
\psi^*_{vk} =
\begin{cases}
\eta & v = v_k \\
\epsilon & v \in \mathcal{V},\; v \neq v_k \\
\psi_{vk} & v \notin \mathcal{V}
\end{cases}
$$

## Step 3: Sample $\mu_j$

For each $j = 1,\dots,J$:

$$
\mu_j \mid \cdot
\sim
\mathcal{N}\left(
\frac{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\right)
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}\mu_0
}{
\frac{N}{\sigma_j^2} + \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}
},
\;
\left(\frac{N}{\sigma_j^2} + \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2}\right)^{-1}
\right)
$$

## Step 4: Sample $\sigma_j^2$

For each $j = 1,\dots,J$:

$$
\sigma_j^2 \mid \cdot
\sim
\text{InvGamma}\left(
a_{\sigma^2} + \frac{N}{2},
\;
b_{\sigma^2} + \frac{1}{2}\sum_{i=1}^N
\left(y_{ij} - \mu_j - \phi_j^* f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}\right)^2
\right)
$$

## Step 5: Sample $\phi_j$

For each $j \notin \mathcal{A}$:

$$
\phi_j \mid \cdot
\sim
\mathcal{N}^+\left(
\frac{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}(y_{ij} - \mu_j)
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}\mu_\phi
}{
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}^2
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}
},
\;
\left(
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2}\sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda_S(j)}^2
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}
\right)^{-1}
\right)
$$

For $j \in \mathcal{A}$:
$$
\phi_j = 1
$$

## Step 6: Sample Latent Factors $\boldsymbol{f}_i$ (Adaptive MH with Robbins--Monro)

For each $i = 1,\dots,N$:

### Proposal

$$
\boldsymbol{f}_i' \sim \mathcal{N}\left(\boldsymbol{f}_i,\; \Sigma_f^{(i)}\right)
$$

where

$$
\Sigma_f^{(i)} = s_{f,i}^2 \; \widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{f}_i^{(1:t)}) + \epsilon I_L
$$

---

### Acceptance probability

$$
\alpha = \min\left(1,
\exp\left(
\log p(\boldsymbol{f}_i' \mid \cdot)
-
\log p(\boldsymbol{f}_i \mid \cdot)
\right)
\right)
$$

---

### Robbins--Monro scaling update (during burn-in)

$$
\log s_{f,i}^{(t+1)}
=
\log s_{f,i}^{(t)}
+
\kappa_t \left(\alpha - \alpha_f^*\right)
$$

with target acceptance $\alpha_f^* \approx 0.3$.

---

### Covariance adaptation

$$
\widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{f}_i^{(1:t)})
\leftarrow
\text{EmpiricalCov}(\boldsymbol{f}_i^{(1:t)})
$$

## Step 7: Sample $\boldsymbol{\tau}$ (Adaptive MH with Robbins--Monro)

Let $\boldsymbol{\tau}_{1:K-1} \in \mathbb{R}^{K-1}$.

### Proposal

$$
\boldsymbol{\tau}' \sim \mathcal{N}(\boldsymbol{\tau}, \Sigma_\tau)
$$

where

$$
\Sigma_\tau = s_\tau^2 \; \widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{\tau}^{(1:t)}) + \epsilon I
$$

---

### Acceptance probability

$$
\alpha = \min\left(1,
\exp\left(
\log p(\boldsymbol{\tau}' \mid \cdot)
-
\log p(\boldsymbol{\tau} \mid \cdot)
\right)
\right)
$$

---

### Robbins--Monro update

$$
\log s_\tau^{(t+1)}
=
\log s_\tau^{(t)}
+
\kappa_t (\alpha - \alpha_\tau^*)
$$

with $\alpha_\tau^* \approx 0.234$.

---

### Covariance adaptation

$$
\widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{\tau}^{(1:t)})
\leftarrow
\text{EmpiricalCov}(\boldsymbol{\tau}^{(1:t)})
$$

## Step 8: Sample $\boldsymbol{\gamma}$ (Adaptive MH with Robbins--Monro)

Let $\boldsymbol{\gamma}_{\{1,\dots,K-1\}\setminus \mathcal{B}} \in \mathbb{R}^{K-1-|\mathcal{B}|}$.

### Proposal

$$
\boldsymbol{\gamma}' \sim \mathcal{N}(\boldsymbol{\gamma}, \Sigma_\gamma)
$$

where

$$
\Sigma_\gamma = s_\gamma^2 \; \widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{\gamma}^{(1:t)}) + \epsilon I
$$

---

### Acceptance probability

$$
\alpha = \min\left(1,
\exp\left(
\log p(\boldsymbol{\gamma}' \mid \cdot)
-
\log p(\boldsymbol{\gamma} \mid \cdot)
\right)
\right)
$$

---

### Robbins--Monro update

$$
\log s_\gamma^{(t+1)}
=
\log s_\gamma^{(t)}
+
\kappa_t (\alpha - \alpha_\gamma^*)
$$

with $\alpha_\gamma^* \approx 0.234$.

---

### Covariance adaptation

$$
\widehat{\text{Cov}}(\boldsymbol{\gamma}^{(1:t)})
\leftarrow
\text{EmpiricalCov}(\boldsymbol{\gamma}^{(1:t)})
$$

## Step 9: Sample $\rho$ (Adaptive MH with Robbins--Monro)

Work on transformed scale:

$$
\xi = \log\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho}\right)
$$

---

### Proposal

$$
\xi' \sim \mathcal{N}(\xi, s_\rho^2)
$$

$$
\rho' = \frac{1}{1 + e^{-\xi'}}
$$

---

### Acceptance probability

$$
\alpha = \min\left(1,
\exp\left(
\log p(\rho' \mid \cdot)
-
\log p(\rho \mid \cdot)
+
\log \rho' + \log(1 - \rho')
-
\log \rho - \log(1 - \rho)
\right)
\right)
$$

---

### Robbins--Monro update

$$
\log s_\rho^{(t+1)}
=
\log s_\rho^{(t)}
+
\kappa_t (\alpha - \alpha_\rho^*)
$$

with target acceptance $\alpha_\rho^* \approx 0.44$.

## Notes on Adaptation

During burn-in ($t \leq T_{\text{adapt}}$):

- Use step size:
$$
\kappa_t = t^{-a}, \quad a \in (0.5,1]
$$

- Update both:
  - covariance (shape)
  - scale (size)

After burn-in:

- Fix:
$$
\Sigma_f^{(i)}, \quad \Sigma_\tau, \quad \Sigma_\gamma, \quad s_\rho
$$

to preserve ergodicity.

## Step 10: Update Derived Quantities

- Recompute:
  $$
  R(\rho), \quad R^{-1}, \quad \log |R|
  $$

- Update sufficient statistics if needed:
  $$
  n_{vk}, \quad n_{ik}
  $$

---

## Step 11: Store Samples

If $t > B$ (post burn-in), store:

$$
\{\mu_j,\; \sigma_j^2,\; \phi_j,\;
\boldsymbol{f}_i,\;
\boldsymbol{\tau},\;
\boldsymbol{\gamma},\;
\rho\}
$$

Optionally store $z_{im}$.
